macro_markets.query: What are the most important macroeconomic and stock market news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major index movements, Fed/central bank news, and significant company earnings or announcements.

crypto_news.query: What are the most significant cryptocurrency and blockchain news from the past 24 hours? Include major price movements, regulatory news, and notable project developments.

items.title: KelpDAO Suffers $200M-$293M Exploit, AAVE Plunges 10%
items.summary: KelpDAO faced a major DeFi hack on April 19 where attackers minted fake rsETH tokens to borrow real ETH, causing losses of $200M to $293M and triggering a 10% drop in AAVE price along with bridge halts.

items.title: Bitcoin Hits $77K-$78K High Then Dips Below $75K Amid Geopolitical Tensions
items.summary: Bitcoin surged to $77K-$78K following Iran-US drama and Middle East tensions but later dipped below $75K, dropping $3K from its local peak, with altcoins losing over 3%.

items.title: Crypto Market Liquidations Reach $820M in Largest 2026 Single-Day Wipeout
items.summary: Total market cap hit $2.69T as $820M in leveraged positions were liquidated, signaling structural recovery after a 46-day bottom, with BTC breaking its 7-month downtrend.

items.title: Ethena Surges 14% on High Volume and Whale Activity
items.summary: Ethena's price rose 14% to test key resistance levels, supported by increased trading volume and whale accumulation.

items.title: Massive Gainers: Dogechain ($DC) Up 1040%, $BEER 491%, $MAGA 435%
items.summary: Top performers included Dogechain ($DC) surging 1040% to $0.00002824, Beers ($BEER) up 491% to $0.06259, and TRUMP MAGA ($MAGA) gaining 435% to $0.3695 amid bullish market sentiment.

items.title: Adam Back Predicts Bitcoin Could Reach $500K-$1M in Two Years
items.summary: Blockstream CEO Adam Back forecasts Bitcoin hitting $500K to $1M within two years, driven by ETF inflows, corporate treasuries like MicroStrategy, and institutional demand.

items.title: Chainlink Drops 4% to $9.30 Amid Rapid Sell-Offs
items.summary: Chainlink price fell over 4% to $9.30 with trading volumes exceeding $600M due to heavy selling pressure.

items.title: BNB Chain Burns $1B in Tokens During 35th Quarterly Auto-Burn
items.summary: BNB Chain completed its 35th quarterly auto-burn on April 15, destroying $1B worth of tokens to reduce supply.

ai_news.query: What are the most important artificial intelligence and machine learning news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include new model releases, company announcements, research breakthroughs, and industry trends.

items.title: Stanford Report: China Pulls Ahead of US in AI Race
items.summary: Stanford University's 2026 AI Index report reveals China leading in AI research publications, citations, and industrial robot deployment at nine times the US rate, with model performance gaps narrowing to single digits. The US maintains an edge in private investment at $258.9 billion versus China's $12.4 billion.

items.title: Anthropic Releases Claude Opus 4.7 with Top Benchmarks
items.summary: Anthropic launched Claude Opus 4.7, scoring 87.6% on SWE-bench Verified, 94.2% on GPQA, supporting 1M token context and 3.3x higher-resolution vision. It also introduced Claude Design as part of a shift toward domain specialists and workflow agents.

items.title: OpenAI Unveils GPT-Rosalind for Life Science Research
items.summary: OpenAI released GPT-Rosalind, a frontier reasoning model specialized for life sciences, alongside updates to Codex. Google announced Gemini app for macOS.

items.title: Cerebras Files for US IPO with Strong 2025 Financials
items.summary: AI chipmaker Cerebras publicly filed S-1 for Nasdaq listing as 'CBRS', reporting $510M revenue and $87.9M net income in 2025, up from a $484.8M loss on $290M in 2024.

items.title: Nvidia's Strong Forecast Boosts AI Market Confidence
items.summary: Nvidia's positive forecast calmed AI bubble concerns, with shares jumping 5% in extended trading to add $220B market value after a prior 8% drop amid three-year 1,200% surge.

items.title: Brookfield Launches $100 Billion AI Infrastructure Fund
items.summary: Brookfield announced a $100 billion AI infrastructure program anchored by a new fund targeting $10 billion in equity, focusing on data centers and compute.

items.title: AI Vendors Downplay Security Flaws in Models and Protocols
items.summary: Researchers disclosed vulnerabilities in Anthropic's MCP protocol risking 200,000 servers and other AI flaws; vendors like Anthropic, Google, and GitHub offered minimal bounties without CVEs or patches, calling issues 'intended' or 'known.'

items.title: China Regulates Risks from AI 'Digital Humans'
items.summary: Chinese authorities seek to curb ethics and scam risks from generative AI 'digital humans,' sparking online debates on tighter regulation.

gaming.query: What are the most notable video game and gaming industry news from the past 24 hours? Include game releases, announcements, esports, and industry developments.

items.title: Fallout 76 Receives New PTS Patch and Tuesday Live Server Update
items.summary: A fresh Public Test Server (PTS) update dropped in the last 24 hours, with an additional live server maintenance patch scheduled for Tuesday.

items.title: Assassin's Creed Black Flag Remake Leaks Emerge with Substantial Details
items.summary: New leaks reveal details on the unannounced Assassin's Creed Black Flag remake, expected to be revealed soon; other rumors include Xbox changes, Rockstar leaks, Fable delay, and Metro 2039 targeting pre-GTA 6 release.

items.title: The Division 2 Announces Live Stream Monday, Title Update, and New Named AR
items.summary: Upcoming live stream on Monday will cover a title update and introduction of a new named assault rifle in The Division 2.

tech_news.query: What are the most important technology news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major product launches, company news, and significant tech industry developments. Exclude AI-specific news.
